items.name: -rich-text_3
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
**Customer Segmentation Data**
Breakdown of adoption/usage by customer segment

items.name: csd-importance
items.label: Importance
items.description: On a scale of 1-10, how important is this metric to our portfolio strategy?

items.name: -rich-text_1_2
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
CRM
Product analytics
Customer surveys
**Collection Method:** * Define key segmentation criteria (industry, company size, use case, etc.) * Tag customers in CRM with segment identifiers * Create data connectors between CRM and analytics platforms **Analysis:** * Create segment-specific dashboards showing adoption, usage, and satisfaction

rules.visible: <branch e="true" info=""><if e="true"><conditions e="true" op="And"><condition e="false"><var>Questions.csd_details.Value</var><op>Equal</op><arg>Boolean:True</arg></condition></conditions><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:True</arg></function></action></if><if e="true"><conditions e="true"/><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:False</arg></function></action></if></branch>

items.name: -rich-text_4
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
**Feature Usage Patterns**
Which features are most/least used by which segments

items.name: fup-importance
items.label: Importance
items.description: On a scale of 1-10, how important is this metric to our portfolio strategy?

items.name: -rich-text
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
Product analytics
**Collection Method:** * Implement event tracking for all key features (clicks, time spent, completion rates) * Tag events with user segment information * Track feature usage frequency and duration **Calculation:** * Feature Adoption Rate = (Users who used feature / Total active users) × 100%

rules.visible: <branch e="true" info=""><if e="true"><conditions e="true" op="And"><condition e="false"><var>Questions.fup_details.Value</var><op>Equal</op><arg>Boolean:True</arg></condition></conditions><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:True</arg></function></action></if><if e="true"><conditions e="true"/><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:False</arg></function></action></if></branch>

items.name: -rich-text_5
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
**Customer Acquisition cost**
Cost to acquire new customers

items.name: cac-importance
items.label: Importance
items.description: On a scale of 1-10, how important is this metric to our portfolio strategy?

items.name: -rich-text_2
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
Marketing expenses
Sales expenses
CRM
**Collection Method:** * Track all marketing and sales expenses by channel * Count new customers acquired per period **Calculation: ** * CAC = Total acquisition costs / Number of new customers acquired **Segmentation: ** * Calculate by channel, segment, and campaign **Review Cadence: ** * Monthly with quarterly trend analysis

rules.visible: <branch e="true" info=""><if e="true"><conditions e="true" op="And"><condition e="false"><var>Questions.cac_details.Value</var><op>Equal</op><arg>Boolean:True</arg></condition></conditions><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:True</arg></function></action></if><if e="true"><conditions e="true"/><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:False</arg></function></action></if></branch>

items.name: -rich-text_3_1
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
**Customer Lifetime Value (CLV)**
Expected revenue from a customer over time (in general per product/license)

items.name: clv-importance
items.label: Importance
items.description: On a scale of 1-10, how important is this metric to our portfolio strategy?

items.name: -clv-details
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
Billing system
CRM
Product analytics
**Collection Method:** * Track revenue per customer over time * Measure average customer lifespan **Calculation: ** * CLV = Average Revenue Per User (ARPU) × Average customer lifespan

rules.visible: <branch e="true" info=""><if e="true"><conditions e="true" op="And"><condition e="false"><var>Questions.csd_details_1.Value</var><op>Equal</op><arg>Boolean:True</arg></condition></conditions><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:True</arg></function></action></if><if e="true"><conditions e="true"/><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:False</arg></function></action></if></branch>

items.name: -rich-text_3_2
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
**Net Promoter Score (NPS)**
Beyond satisfaction, measure customer loyalty

items.name: nps-importance
items.label: Importance
items.description: On a scale of 1-10, how important is this metric to our portfolio strategy?

items.name: -nps-details
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
Customer surveys
**Collection Method:** * Implement in-app or email NPS surveys * Ask: "On a scale of 0-10, how likely are you to recommend our product?" * Follow up with "Why did you give this score?" **Calculation:** * NPS = % Promoters (9-10) - % Detractors (0-6) **Frequency:** * 2-times per year for each customer, with rolling collection

rules.visible: <branch e="true" info=""><if e="true"><conditions e="true" op="And"><condition e="false"><var>Questions.csd_details_2.Value</var><op>Equal</op><arg>Boolean:True</arg></condition></conditions><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:True</arg></function></action></if><if e="true"><conditions e="true"/><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:False</arg></function></action></if></branch>

items.name: -rich-text_3_3
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
**Churn Rate & Reasons**
Track why customers leave

items.name: churnrate-importance
items.label: Importance
items.description: On a scale of 1-10, how important is this metric to our portfolio strategy?

items.name: -churnrate-details
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
CRM
Billing system
Exit surveys
**Collection Method:** * Track account closures or non-renewals * Implement exit surveys or interviews * Categorize churn reasons (price, features, support, etc.) **Calculation:** * Churn Rate = (Customers lost in period / Total customers at start of period) × 100% **Analysis:** * Segment by customer type, tenure, and reason

rules.visible: <branch e="true" info=""><if e="true"><conditions e="true" op="And"><condition e="false"><var>Questions.csd_details_3.Value</var><op>Equal</op><arg>Boolean:True</arg></condition></conditions><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:True</arg></function></action></if><if e="true"><conditions e="true"/><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:False</arg></function></action></if></branch>

items.name: -rich-text_3_4
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
**Feature Comparison Analysis**
Detailed competitive feature analysis (e.g. comparison of Woodford against similar tools)

items.name: fca-importance
items.label: Importance
items.description: On a scale of 1-10, how important is this metric to our portfolio strategy?

items.name: -fca_details
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
Competitor websites
Product documentation
Sales intelligence
**Collection Method:** * Create comprehensive feature list * Rate each competitor on feature presence and quality * Update quarterly or after major competitor releases **Analysis:** * Identify competitive gaps and advantages **Visualization:** * Heat map showing relative strengths

rules.visible: <branch e="true" info=""><if e="true"><conditions e="true" op="And"><condition e="false"><var>Questions.fca_details.Value</var><op>Equal</op><arg>Boolean:True</arg></condition></conditions><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:True</arg></function></action></if><if e="true"><conditions e="true"/><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:False</arg></function></action></if></branch>

items.name: -rich-text_4_1
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
**Win/Loss Analysis**
Reasons for winning or losing deals against competitors

items.name: winloss-importance
items.label: Importance
items.description: On a scale of 1-10, how important is this metric to our portfolio strategy?

items.name: -winloss-details
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
CRM
Sales team interviews
Customer feedback
**Collection Method:** * Conduct post-decision interviews for both won and lost deals * Document specific reasons for decisions * Categorize by competitor and decision factor **Analysis:** * Identify patterns in wins vs. losses **Frequency:** * Review monthly with quarterly trend analysis

rules.visible: <branch e="true" info=""><if e="true"><conditions e="true" op="And"><condition e="false"><var>Questions.winloss_details.Value</var><op>Equal</op><arg>Boolean:True</arg></condition></conditions><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:True</arg></function></action></if><if e="true"><conditions e="true"/><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:False</arg></function></action></if></branch>

items.name: -rich-text_5_1
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
**Pricing Position**
Resco pricing relative to market alternatives

items.name: pricepos-importance
items.label: Importance
items.description: On a scale of 1-10, how important is this metric to our portfolio strategy?

items.name: -pricepos-details
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
Sales intelligence
Competitor pricing pages
**Collection Method:** * Track competitor pricing models and price points * Calculate price-to-value ratios * Monitor price changes **Analysis: ** * Create pricing position **Frequency: ** * Review quarterly or after competitor price changes

rules.visible: <branch e="true" info=""><if e="true"><conditions e="true" op="And"><condition e="false"><var>Questions.pricepos_details.Value</var><op>Equal</op><arg>Boolean:True</arg></condition></conditions><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:True</arg></function></action></if><if e="true"><conditions e="true"/><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:False</arg></function></action></if></branch>

items.name: -rich-text_3_1_1
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
**Competitive Response Time**
How quickly competitors respond to our innovations (Check when similar features introduced by Resco were released by competitors & vice versa)

items.name: crt-importance
items.label: Importance
items.description: On a scale of 1-10, how important is this metric to our portfolio strategy?

items.name: -crt-details
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
Market monitoring
Product announcements
**Collection Method:** * Track dates of our feature releases * Monitor competitor responses * Calculate time between our innovation and competitor response **Analysis:** * Identify patterns in competitor behavior **Visualization:** * Timeline of releases and responses

rules.visible: <branch e="true" info=""><if e="true"><conditions e="true" op="And"><condition e="false"><var>Questions.crt_details.Value</var><op>Equal</op><arg>Boolean:True</arg></condition></conditions><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:True</arg></function></action></if><if e="true"><conditions e="true"/><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:False</arg></function></action></if></branch>

items.name: -rich-text_3_4_1
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
**Strategic Fit Score**
How well features align with company strategy

items.name: stratalign-importance
items.label: Importance
items.description: On a scale of 1-10, how important is this metric to our portfolio strategy?

items.name: -stratalign_details
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
Strategic plans
Product roadmaps
**Collection Method:** * Define key strategic pillars/objectives * Rate each initiative on alignment (1-10 scale) * Require minimum threshold for approval **Calculation:** * Create weighted scoring system based on strategic priorities **Process:** * Include in roadmap planning and prioritization

rules.visible: <branch e="true" info=""><if e="true"><conditions e="true" op="And"><condition e="false"><var>Questions.stratalign_details.Value</var><op>Equal</op><arg>Boolean:True</arg></condition></conditions><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:True</arg></function></action></if><if e="true"><conditions e="true"/><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:False</arg></function></action></if></branch>

items.name: -portfoliobal
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
**Portfolio Balance**
Distribution of resources across product types/categories

items.name: portfoliobal-importance
items.label: Importance
items.description: On a scale of 1-10, how important is this metric to our portfolio strategy?

items.name: -portbal-details
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
Resource allocation
Project categorization
**Collection Method:** * Categorize initiatives (e.g., new features, improvements, maintenance) * Track resource allocation across categories * Monitor balance across product lines **Analysis:** * Compare actual vs. target allocation **Visualization:** * Pie charts showing resource distribution

rules.visible: <branch e="true" info=""><if e="true"><conditions e="true" op="And"><condition e="false"><var>Questions.portbal_details_1.Value</var><op>Equal</op><arg>Boolean:True</arg></condition></conditions><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:True</arg></function></action></if><if e="true"><conditions e="true"/><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:False</arg></function></action></if></branch>

items.name: -rich-text_3_5
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
**Recurring Revenue Metrics**
MRR/ARR growth and retention

items.name: recrev-importance
items.label: Importance
items.description: On a scale of 1-10, how important is this metric to our portfolio strategy?

items.name: -recrev-details
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
Billing system
Contracts
**Collection Method:** * Track MRR/ARR by customer and plan * Monitor changes (new, expansion, contraction, churn) **Calculations:** * MRR Growth Rate = (Current MRR - Previous MRR) / Previous MRR × 100% * Net Revenue Retention = (Starting MRR + Expansion - Contraction - Churn) / Starting MRR × 100% **Visualization:** * Waterfall charts showing MRR changes

rules.visible: <branch e="true" info=""><if e="true"><conditions e="true" op="And"><condition e="false"><var>Questions.recrev_details.Value</var><op>Equal</op><arg>Boolean:True</arg></condition></conditions><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:True</arg></function></action></if><if e="true"><conditions e="true"/><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:False</arg></function></action></if></branch>

items.name: -rich-text_4_2
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
**Revenue per Customer**
Average revenue per user/account (Count in any applied discounts or special deals)

items.name: revpc-importance
items.label: Importance
items.description: On a scale of 1-10, how important is this metric to our portfolio strategy?

items.name: -revpc-details
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
Billing system
CRM
**Collection Method:** * Track total revenue by customer * Calculate averages by segment **Calculations:** * ARPU = Total revenue / Number of customers * ARPPU = Total revenue / Number of paying users (if freemium) **Analysis:** * Track trends over time and after price changes

rules.visible: <branch e="true" info=""><if e="true"><conditions e="true" op="And"><condition e="false"><var>Questions.revpc-details.Value</var><op>Equal</op><arg>Boolean:True</arg></condition></conditions><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:True</arg></function></action></if><if e="true"><conditions e="true"/><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:False</arg></function></action></if></branch>

items.name: -rich-text_5_2
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
**Expansion Revenue**
Additional revenue from existing customers (License tier upsell & extra amounts of licenses)

items.name: exprev-importance
items.label: Importance
items.description: On a scale of 1-10, how important is this metric to our portfolio strategy?

items.name: -exprev-details
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
Billing system
CRM
**Collection Method:** * Track upsells, cross-sells, and plan upgrades * Monitor usage-based billing increases **Calculation:** * Expansion Revenue Rate = Additional revenue from existing customers / Total revenue at start of period × 100% **Analysis:** * Identify expansion patterns and triggers

rules.visible: <branch e="true" info=""><if e="true"><conditions e="true" op="And"><condition e="false"><var>Questions.exprev-details.Value</var><op>Equal</op><arg>Boolean:True</arg></condition></conditions><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:True</arg></function></action></if><if e="true"><conditions e="true"/><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:False</arg></function></action></if></branch>

items.name: -actprate
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
**Active Partner Rate**
Expected revenue from a customer over time (in general per product/license)

items.name: actprate-importance
items.label: Importance
items.description: On a scale of 1-10, how important is this metric to our portfolio strategy?

items.name: -actprate-details
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
CRM
**Collection Method:** * Define criteria for “active” (e.g., min. 1 project delivered or license activated per year). * Track partner activity through CRM pipeline + billing. * Create dashboard showing active vs inactive partners and trends over time.

rules.visible: <branch e="true" info=""><if e="true"><conditions e="true" op="And"><condition e="false"><var>Questions.actprate_details.Value</var><op>Equal</op><arg>Boolean:True</arg></condition></conditions><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:True</arg></function></action></if><if e="true"><conditions e="true"/><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:False</arg></function></action></if></branch>

items.name: -rich-text_3_2_1
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
**Partner-Sourced Revenue**
Portion of total revenue that originates from partner-led or partner-sourced deals.

items.name: partsrev-importance
items.label: Importance
items.description: On a scale of 1-10, how important is this metric to our portfolio strategy?

items.name: -partsrev-details
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
CRM
**Collection Method:** * Tag deals in CRM as “partner-sourced” vs “direct.” * Calculate revenue contribution per partner and share of total revenue. * Create quarterly reports highlighting top contributors.

rules.visible: <branch e="true" info=""><if e="true"><conditions e="true" op="And"><condition e="false"><var>Questions.partsrev-details.Value</var><op>Equal</op><arg>Boolean:True</arg></condition></conditions><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:True</arg></function></action></if><if e="true"><conditions e="true"/><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:False</arg></function></action></if></branch>

items.name: -rich-text_3_3_1
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
**Time-to-First Deployment**
Average time it takes a partner to deliver their first live customer project after onboarding.

items.name: pcert-importance
items.label: Importance
items.description: On a scale of 1-10, how important is this metric to our portfolio strategy?

items.name: -pcert-details
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
Certification database
**Collection Method:** * Track course enrollment and completion by partner company. * Define certification levels (basic, advanced, expert). * Create dashboards showing % certified by partner and certification trends.

rules.visible: <branch e="true" info=""><if e="true"><conditions e="true" op="And"><condition e="false"><var>Questions.pcert-details.Value</var><op>Equal</op><arg>Boolean:True</arg></condition></conditions><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:True</arg></function></action></if><if e="true"><conditions e="true"/><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:False</arg></function></action></if></branch>

items.name: -rich-text_3_3_1_1
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
**Partner Certification & Training Completion**
% of partner employees who completed official training or certification for your solution.

items.name: ttfd-importance
items.label: Importance
items.description: On a scale of 1-10, how important is this metric to our portfolio strategy?

items.name: -ttfd-details
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
CRM
**Collection Method:** * Record partner onboarding date (contract signed, training started). * Track first project go-live milestone. * Calculate median/average time in months between onboarding and first deployment.

rules.visible: <branch e="true" info=""><if e="true"><conditions e="true" op="And"><condition e="false"><var>Questions.ttfd-details.Value</var><op>Equal</op><arg>Boolean:True</arg></condition></conditions><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:True</arg></function></action></if><if e="true"><conditions e="true"/><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:False</arg></function></action></if></branch>

items.name: -rich-text_3_4_2
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
**Payback Period**
Time to recoup development investment (How long until we get money back for development)

items.name: paybackper-importance
items.label: Importance
items.description: On a scale of 1-10, how important is this metric to our portfolio strategy?

items.name: -rich-text_3_4_3
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
**Time-to-Value**
How quickly customers achieve value after implementation & deployment

items.name: ttv-importance
items.label: Importance
items.description: On a scale of 1-10, how important is this metric to our portfolio strategy?

items.name: -ttv_details
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
Product analytics
Onboarding metrics
**Collection Method:** * Define "value moments" for your product (e.g., first successful transaction) * Track time from account creation to value moment **Calculation:** * Median time from signup to value moment **Segmentation:** * By customer type, implementation method, and support level **Improvement Strategy:** * Create onboarding KPIs for product teams

rules.visible: <branch e="true" info=""><if e="true"><conditions e="true" op="And"><condition e="false"><var>Questions.ttv_details.Value</var><op>Equal</op><arg>Boolean:True</arg></condition></conditions><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:True</arg></function></action></if><if e="true"><conditions e="true"/><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:False</arg></function></action></if></branch>

items.name: -far
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
**Feature Adoption Rate**
Percentage of users adopting new features

items.name: far-importance
items.label: Importance
items.description: On a scale of 1-10, how important is this metric to our portfolio strategy?

items.name: -far-details
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
Product analytics
**Collection Method:** * Track first usage of each feature by user * Monitor ongoing usage patterns **Calculation:** * Feature adoption = (Users who used feature at least once / Total users) × 100% **Visualization:** * Create adoption curve showing rate over time after release

rules.visible: <branch e="true" info=""><if e="true"><conditions e="true" op="And"><condition e="false"><var>Questions.far-details.Value</var><op>Equal</op><arg>Boolean:True</arg></condition></conditions><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:True</arg></function></action></if><if e="true"><conditions e="true"/><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:False</arg></function></action></if></branch>

items.name: -engage
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
**Engagement Metrics**
Daily/weekly/monthly active users (DAU/WAU/MAU) - Here we need to align on relevant base

items.name: engage-importance
items.label: Importance
items.description: On a scale of 1-10, how important is this metric to our portfolio strategy?

items.name: -engage-details
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
Product analytics
**Collection Method:** * Track unique active users daily, weekly, and monthly * Measure session frequency, duration, and depth **Calculations:** * DAU/MAU Ratio = Daily Active Users / Monthly Active Users * Average Session Duration = Total time spent / Number of sessions **Benchmarking:** * Compare to industry standards for your product category

rules.visible: <branch e="true" info=""><if e="true"><conditions e="true" op="And"><condition e="false"><var>Questions.engage-details.Value</var><op>Equal</op><arg>Boolean:True</arg></condition></conditions><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:True</arg></function></action></if><if e="true"><conditions e="true"/><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:False</arg></function></action></if></branch>

items.name: -rich-text_3_1_1_1
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
**User Journey Analytics**
Drop-off points in user workflows (Where users leave the workflows)

items.name: usrjrny-importance
items.label: Importance
items.description: On a scale of 1-10, how important is this metric to our portfolio strategy?

items.name: -usrjrny-details
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
Product analytics
Session recordings
**Collection Method:** * Define key user flows and expected paths * Track completion rates and drop-offs at each step * Implement funnel analysis **Analysis:** * Identify bottlenecks and friction points

rules.visible: <branch e="true" info=""><if e="true"><conditions e="true" op="And"><condition e="false"><var>Questions.usrjrny-details.Value</var><op>Equal</op><arg>Boolean:True</arg></condition></conditions><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:True</arg></function></action></if><if e="true"><conditions e="true"/><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:False</arg></function></action></if></branch>

items.name: -rich-text_4_1_1
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
**Technical Debt Metrics**
Quantification of technical debt (How much TB do we have in comparison to other work)

items.name: techdebt-importance
items.label: Importance
items.description: On a scale of 1-10, how important is this metric to our portfolio strategy?

items.name: -techdebt-details
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
Code analysis tools
Engineering assessments
**Collection Method:** * Run static code analysis * Track code coverage and test automation * Conduct regular technical debt assessments **Measurements:** * Code complexity scores * Test coverage percentage * Bug density by module * Time spent on maintenance vs. new development

rules.visible: <branch e="true" info=""><if e="true"><conditions e="true" op="And"><condition e="false"><var>Questions.techdebt-details.Value</var><op>Equal</op><arg>Boolean:True</arg></condition></conditions><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:True</arg></function></action></if><if e="true"><conditions e="true"/><action><function e="true"><var>[Regarding].IsVisible</var><func>Assign</func><arg>Boolean:False</arg></function></action></if></branch>

items.name: -rich-text_5_1_1
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
**Innovation Rate**
Percentage of resources dedicated to innovation vs. maintenance

items.name: inovrate-importance
items.label: Importance
items.description: On a scale of 1-10, how important is this metric to our portfolio strategy?

items.name: -inovrate-details
items.label: Rich Text
items.content:
JIRA
**Collection Method:** * Categorize work as innovation, growth, or maintenance (e.g. features, improvements, bugs, tech debts..) * Track resource allocation across categories **Calculation:** * Innovation Rate = Time spent on innovation / Total development time × 100% **Target Setting:** * Establish minimum innovation allocation
